title: UltraBlockRegen
description: An ultimate Block Regen plugin with cool features!!!
body:
A smart Minecraft Block Regen plugin with cool features and fully customisable.

## Features

- Configurable Regen System
- Custom Regen system for each blocks
- Supports Region system
- FUlly Customisable config.yml
- Set drop-items: false in config.yml to get broken blocks directly in your inventory instead 
  of drops

## Installation

1. Download the latest BlockRegen.jar from Releases
2. Place the jar file in your server's plugins/ folder
3. Restart your server or use a plugin manager to load it
4. Configure settings in plugins/UltraBlockRegen/config.yml
5. Reload with /br reload

## Commands

- /br wand: get selection wand to select area for region creation
- /br region create <name>: To create a region after selecting area with wand
- /br region delete <name>: Deletes a region
- /br region list: List of all regions
- /br region info <name>: gives info of region
- /br region set <name> regen-time: custom regen time for selected region
- /br region set <name> replacement-block: To set block which will come after block breaking           
                                           at time of regen
- /br reload: reload the plugin
- /br status: view pending regen count

## Permissions

- blockregen.admin (default: op) — All commands + wand usage
- blockregen.bypass (default: false) — Blocks break normally, no regen

## Requirements

- Minecraft Version: 1.17 - 1.21+ Server Software: Spigot, Paper, or any Bukkit-based server Java Version: 17+
